---
title: "Model Fit Summary"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8)
```

# Model Fit

- There are three components in the model where unobservables show up.
- $a_i = x_i' \hat \gamma^D + \hat \varepsilon_i$, $c_i^W=x_i'\hat \gamma^W + \hat \varepsilon_i^W$, $c_i^F=x_i'\hat \gamma^F + \hat \varepsilon_i^F$.
- Solve the with and without $\hat \epsilon_i$ and show scatter plots.

## Wage

### With Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage.png")
```

### Without Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_observable.png")
```

### Actual Wage vs. Marginal Cost Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_mc_W.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_mc_F.png")
```

<!-- ### Taking Expectations by Resampling Residuals -->
<!-- ```{r, out.width="50%"} -->
<!-- knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_resample.png") -->
<!-- ``` -->


## Fee

### With Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee.png")
```

### Without Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_observable.png")
```

### Actual Fee vs. Marginal Cost Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_mc_W.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_mc_F.png")
```

<!-- ### Taking Expectations by Resampling Residuals -->
<!-- ```{r, out.width="50%"} -->
<!-- knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_resample.png") -->
<!-- ``` -->



## Margin
- margin = $log(fee)-log(wage)$

### With Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/margin.png")
```

### Without Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/margin_observable.png")
```

### Wage Error vs. Fee Error Without Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_fee_error.png")
```

<!-- ### Taking Expectations by Resampling Residuals -->
<!-- ```{r, out.width="50%"} -->
<!-- knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/margin_resample.png") -->
<!-- ``` -->

### Match 
- Log of the number of matches relative to outside option $log{(q/q_0)}$

### With Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/match.png")
```

### Without Residuals
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/match_observable.png")
```

<!-- ### Taking Expectations by Resampling Residuals -->
<!-- ```{r, out.width="50%"} -->
<!-- knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/match_resample.png") -->
<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ## Aggregate -->

<!-- ```{r, out.width="50%"} -->
<!-- knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_aggregate.png") -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r, out.width="50%"} -->
<!-- knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_aggregate.png") -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r, out.width="50%"} -->
<!-- knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/margin_aggregate.png") -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r, out.width="50%"} -->
<!-- knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/match_aggregate.png") -->
<!-- ``` -->
